blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,978 ft. Looking ahead, 62 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 26".
